reasoning: The ISO27001 A.5.16 Identity Management control focuses on ensuring proper identity and access management. In Kubernetes, this is primarily handled through RBAC (Roles, ClusterRoles, RoleBindings, ClusterRoleBindings) and ServiceAccounts. Ensuring least privilege, avoiding cluster-admin bindings, and managing service account tokens are key aspects of identity management in Kubernetes. Additionally, configuring OIDC authentication can enhance identity management by integrating with external identity providers.
title: Identity Management
